commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `src/retrieval.ts` to retry docs corpus fetches, use a default fallback URL, and continue workspace construction with a corpus-unavailable note when docs are down.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main lets a docs corpus fetch failure reject `buildWorkspace`, while source and GitHub indexes are already caught. I did not run the Worker because this review is read-only.

target.title: fix: tolerate docs corpus outages
target.body:
## Summary
- Retry the docs corpus fetch before giving up.
- Fall back from `/llms-full.txt` to `/.well-known/llms-full.txt` for the default docs corpus URL.
- Keep building a workspace with source/GitHub context plus a mounted corpus-unavailable note when the docs corpus is down.

## Validation
- npm run typecheck
- npm run lint
- npm run format:check
- git diff --check -- src/retrieval.ts
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski
